ComputeRisk classifies risk values as Low (≤2), Medium (≤6), High (≤12), or Critical (>12).
ComputeRisk returns ErrInvalidRating when the impact rating is outside the 1–4 range.
ComputeRisk returns ErrInvalidRating when the feasibility rating is outside the 1–4 range.
ThreatScenario.RiskValue delegates to ComputeRisk using its own Impact and Feasibility fields.
TARA.HighRiskThreats returns only ThreatScenarios rated High or Critical.
GoalRegistry.Unsatisfied returns only CybersecurityGoals with Satisfied=false.
GoalRegistry.Unsatisfied returns an empty slice when all goals are satisfied.
Registry.Add registers a requirement so that All returns it.
Registry.SetMet marks a registered requirement as met, reflected in Analyze.
Registry.SetMet returns an error when the requirement ID is not registered.
Analyze returns Total=0 and ComplianceRatio=0 for an empty registry.
Analyze with empty targetASIL includes requirements of all ASIL levels.
Analyze with a specific targetASIL excludes requirements of other levels.
GapReport.ComplianceRatio equals MetCount divided by Total.
StandardASILDGaps returns exactly 8 predefined ASIL-D gap requirements.

requirements.title: ErrNotConnected is a non-nil mandatory RELAY sentinel
requirements.text: ErrNotConnected shall be a non-nil error such that errors.Is(ErrNotConnected, relay.ErrNotConnected) returns true. It is returned before a connection is established or after a transport drop.

requirements.title: ErrPayloadTooLarge is a non-nil mandatory RELAY sentinel
requirements.text: ErrPayloadTooLarge shall be a non-nil error such that errors.Is(ErrPayloadTooLarge, relay.ErrPayloadTooLarge) returns true. It is returned when a payload exceeds the protocol maximum.

requirements.title: ErrClosed wraps relay.ErrClosed via errors.Is chain
requirements.text: errors.Is(rcp.ErrClosed, relay.ErrClosed) shall return true so callers can use RELAY-level sentinel detection.

requirements.title: ErrNotConnected wraps relay.ErrNotConnected via errors.Is chain
requirements.text: errors.Is(rcp.ErrNotConnected, relay.ErrNotConnected) shall return true so callers can use RELAY-level sentinel detection.

requirements.title: ErrTimeout wraps relay.ErrTimeout via errors.Is chain
requirements.text: errors.Is(rcp.ErrTimeout, relay.ErrTimeout) shall return true so callers can use RELAY-level sentinel detection.

requirements.title: ErrPayloadTooLarge wraps relay.ErrPayloadTooLarge via errors.Is chain
requirements.text: errors.Is(rcp.ErrPayloadTooLarge, relay.ErrPayloadTooLarge) shall return true so callers can use RELAY-level sentinel detection.

requirements.title: ErrNotFound wraps ErrNotConnected via errors.Is chain
requirements.text: errors.Is(rcp.ErrNotFound, rcp.ErrNotConnected) shall return true per RELAY spec §5.4.

requirements.title: ErrAlreadyExists is standalone (not a relay sentinel)
requirements.text: ErrAlreadyExists shall be a standalone sentinel that does not wrap any relay sentinel, per RELAY spec §5.4. errors.Is(rcp.ErrAlreadyExists, rcp.ErrClosed) and errors.Is(rcp.ErrAlreadyExists, relay.ErrClosed) shall both return false; a uniqueness violation is not a relay sentinel condition.

requirements.title: ErrBusy wraps ErrTimeout via errors.Is chain
requirements.text: errors.Is(rcp.ErrBusy, rcp.ErrTimeout) shall return true per RELAY spec §5.4.

requirements.title: ErrZoneMismatch wraps ErrNotConnected via errors.Is chain
requirements.text: errors.Is(rcp.ErrZoneMismatch, rcp.ErrNotConnected) shall return true per RELAY spec §5.4.

requirements.title: SpecVersion exports the RELAY specification version
requirements.text: The package-level constant SpecVersion shall equal relay.SpecVersion, declaring the RELAY spec version this package implements per spec §17.12.

requirements.title: ZoneFromString parses zone name to Zone constant
requirements.text: ZoneFromString shall return the Zone constant matching the input string produced by Zone.String(), enabling round-trip zone identity.

requirements.title: ZoneFromString returns ErrNotFound for unknown zone string
requirements.text: ZoneFromString shall return (ZoneUnknown, ErrNotFound) when the input does not match any known zone name.

requirements.title: Status.ToMessage sets Protocol to relay.RCP
requirements.text: Status.ToMessage() shall return a relay.Message with Protocol = relay.RCP per RELAY spec §15.7.5.

requirements.title: Status.ToMessage maps Zone.String() to ID field
requirements.text: Status.ToMessage() shall set relay.Message.ID to the string returned by Status.Zone.String().

requirements.title: Status.ToMessage preserves Payload and Seq
requirements.text: Status.ToMessage() shall copy Status.Payload to relay.Message.Payload and Status.Seq (as uint64) to relay.Message.Seq.

requirements.title: Status.ToMessage sets rcp.healthy meta field
requirements.text: Status.ToMessage() shall set Meta["rcp.healthy"] to "true" or "false" reflecting Status.Healthy.

requirements.title: CommandFromMessage parses zone from relay.Message.ID
requirements.text: CommandFromMessage shall use ZoneFromString(m.ID) to set Command.Zone and return ErrNotFound for unrecognised zone strings.

requirements.title: CommandFromMessage parses rcp.priority from Meta
requirements.text: CommandFromMessage shall map Meta["rcp.priority"] to the corresponding Priority constant (normal/high/critical).

requirements.title: CommandFromMessage parses rcp.cmd_type from Meta
requirements.text: CommandFromMessage shall map Meta["rcp.cmd_type"] to the corresponding CommandType constant (noop/set/get/reset/watchdog/sleep/wake).

requirements.title: ResponseToMessage maps Response fields to relay.Message
requirements.text: ResponseToMessage shall set Protocol=relay.RCP, ID=Response.Zone.String(), Payload=Response.Payload, and Meta["rcp.status"] to the ResponseStatus decimal string.

requirements.title: Adapt wraps Controller as relay.Caller without blocking
requirements.text: Adapt(c Controller) relay.Caller shall return immediately, wrapping c in an adapter satisfying relay.Caller. It shall not establish a connection or block.

requirements.title: adapter.Protocol returns relay.RCP
requirements.text: The adapter returned by Adapt shall return relay.RCP from its Protocol() method.

requirements.title: adapter.Send converts relay.Message to Command and dispatches
requirements.text: adapter.Send shall call CommandFromMessage to convert the relay.Message to a *Command, dispatch it via Controller.Send, and discard the Response.

requirements.title: adapter.Call returns relay.Message from Response
requirements.text: adapter.Call shall call CommandFromMessage, dispatch via Controller.Send, and convert the *Response to relay.Message via ResponseToMessage.

requirements.title: adapter.Subscribe starts goroutine converting Status to relay.Message
requirements.text: adapter.Subscribe shall call Controller.Subscribe(context.Background()), start a goroutine that converts each *Status to relay.Message via ToMessage(), and return the relay.Message channel.

requirements.title: adapter.Subscribe applies SubscriberConfig channel depth
requirements.text: The channel buffered by adapter.Subscribe shall have depth equal to SubscriberConfig.ChanDepth(64).

requirements.title: adapter.Subscribe applies BackPressurePolicy
requirements.text: The goroutine in adapter.Subscribe shall apply the BackPressurePolicy from SubscriberConfig: DropNewest drops arriving messages when full; DropOldest drains one then enqueues; Block waits.

requirements.title: adapter.Close delegates to Controller.Close
requirements.text: adapter.Close() shall call and return the result of Controller.Close().

requirements.title: go-rcp version --format json emits VersionDocument
requirements.text: The go-rcp binary version command with --format json shall emit a JSON object conforming to RELAY spec §12.1 with tool, protocol, protocol_int, version, spec_version, language, and runtime fields.

requirements.title: go-rcp capabilities emits CapabilitiesDocument
requirements.text: The go-rcp binary capabilities command shall emit a JSON object conforming to RELAY spec §12.2 including kind, tool, protocol, commands, transports, features, interfaces, optional_interfaces, and adapt fields.

requirements.title: go-rcp status --format json emits StatusDocument
requirements.text: The go-rcp binary status command with --format json shall emit a JSON object conforming to RELAY spec §12.3 with protocol, tool, version, healthy, connected, endpoint, and details fields.

requirements.title: ServeBackground tracks Serve in WaitGroup before launching goroutine
requirements.text: ServeBackground() shall call wg.Add(1) synchronously before starting the Serve goroutine so that Close().wg.Wait() correctly blocks until Serve exits, avoiding data races on the WaitGroup.

requirements.title: Adapter implements relay.HealthProvider
requirements.text: The Adapt() result shall implement relay.HealthProvider, returning relay.Health from Health().

requirements.title: Health reflects closed and error state
requirements.text: Health() shall return HealthDown when the adapter is closed, HealthDegraded when errors have been recorded while open, and HealthOK otherwise.

requirements.title: Adapter implements relay.MetricsProvider
requirements.text: The Adapt() result shall implement relay.MetricsProvider, returning relay.Metrics from Metrics().

requirements.title: Metrics count writes, deliveries, drops, bytes and errors
requirements.text: Metrics() shall report WriteCount, DeliverCount, DropCount, BytesWritten, BytesDelivered and ErrorCount accumulated across Send, Call and Subscribe.

requirements.title: Adapter implements relay.Drainer
requirements.text: The Adapt() result shall implement relay.Drainer via CloseWithDrain(ctx).

requirements.title: CloseWithDrain waits for in-flight dispatches
requirements.text: CloseWithDrain shall block until in-flight Send/Call dispatches complete, then close; if ctx expires first it shall close immediately and return ctx.Err().

requirements.title: Status.ToMessage matches RELAY golden vector
requirements.text: Status.ToMessage() shall produce a relay.Message matching the published RELAY golden vector spec/vectors/rcp-status.json: protocol=RCP, id="FrontLeft", seq=3, meta[rcp.healthy]="true", payload base64 "AQ==", zero Version.

requirements.title: RELAY canonical schemas reachable
requirements.text: go-RCP shall build against a RELAY module exposing the §15 canonical-type JSON schemas (rcp-command, rcp-status) via relay.Schema(), confirming adoption of spec v0.3 artifacts.

requirements.title: SpecVersion sourced from RELAY module
requirements.text: The exported SpecVersion shall equal relay.SpecVersion (not hardcoded) and be non-empty, per spec §17.12/§19.4.

requirements.title: Concurrent publish and subscriber close never panic
requirements.text: The simulator shall not panic with send-on-closed-channel when statusLoop publish races with Close() or subscriber context cancellation. Subscriber send and close shall be mutually exclusive so a Status is never sent on a closed channel.
